name: agent-q-framework
description: Agent Q framework integration for OpenCode

session-start.description: Detect platform and inject Agent Q context

plan.description: Start a structured planning session with reverse elicitation

execute.description: Execute a build plan with deviation rules and atomic commits

verify.description: Verify completed work against the build plan

orchestrate.description: Full multi-agent pipeline (plan, execute, verify, debug)

spinjitsu.description: Parallel execution of multiple build plans

on_demand.context/engineering-preferences.md: when making architecture or style decisions
on_demand.context/frontend.md: when working on frontend or UI code
